allow: Bash(node -e "const data = require\('./data/tetkik_data.json'\); const cats = {}; data.forEach\(d => { const k = d.anaKapsam || 'unknown'; if \(!cats[k]\) cats[k] = []; cats[k].push\(d\); }\); Object.keys\(cats\).forEach\(k => console.log\(k, cats[k].length\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const data = require\('./data/tetkik_data.json'\); const health = data.filter\(d => d.anaKapsam === 'Sağlık & Tıp'\); const subs = {}; health.forEach\(d => { const k = d.altBaslik1 || 'other'; if \(!subs[k]\) subs[k] = []; subs[k].push\({title: d.title, url: d.url}\); }\); Object.keys\(subs\).slice\(0,20\).forEach\(k => console.log\(k, subs[k].length\)\);")
Bash(curl -s "https://tetkik.com.tr/2024/09/09/glutatyon/" --user-agent "Mozilla/5.0 \(Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64\) AppleWebKit/537.36 \(KHTML, like Gecko\) Chrome/120.0.0.0 Safari/537.36")
Bash(node -e "const d=require\('fs'\).readFileSync\('/dev/stdin','utf8'\); const j=JSON.parse\(d\)[0]; console.log\('State:', j.state, '| Branch:', j.branch, '| Created:', j.created_at\);")
Bash(node -e "const j=require\('./deploy_status.json'\)[0]; console.log\('State:', j.state, '| Branch:', j.branch, '| Commit:', j.commit_ref?.substring\(0,7\)\)")

Bash(node -e "process.stdin.resume\(\);let d='';process.stdin.on\('data',c=>d+=c\);process.stdin.on\('end',\(\)=>{const j=JSON.parse\(d\);console.log\('Build ID:', j.id, '| State:', j.deploy_state\);}\)")
